# hanjo

> hanjo is a bilingual (English / Japanese) growth agency based in Los Angeles. It helps small and mid-sized businesses win and keep more customers online, with a specialty in booking-based businesses (beauty salons, head spas, esthetics, dental, and clinics). Work is offered on performance-based terms wherever possible.

hanjo operates four service lines and works in both English and Japanese with US-based and Japan-rooted businesses in the Los Angeles area.

## Services

- [hanjo Recovery](https://hanjo.ai/recovery/): Rebuilds a business's online booking form and adds automated SMS and email follow-ups that recover lost bookings. Built for salons, spas, and clinics on Square. No setup fee, no monthly fee; hanjo is paid a share of the bookings the system brings in. Includes a free booking-flow diagnostic.
- [hanjo CRM](https://hanjo.ai/crm/): Email and SMS retention for DTC brands on Shopify. hanjo writes the copy, designs the emails, and builds the automated flows that turn first-time buyers into repeat customers.
- [hanjo Web](https://hanjo.ai/web/): Bilingual (EN/JA) websites, landing pages, and Shopify stores. Strategy, copy, design, and build. Shopify Partner.
- [hanjo Ads](https://hanjo.ai/ads/): Meta and Google ad optimization that feeds ad-platform algorithms higher-quality conversion data so delivery concentrates on a business's most valuable customers.

## About

- [About hanjo](https://hanjo.ai/about/): Founded by Kei Nakayama. Bilingual growth partner serving the Los Angeles area in English and Japanese.
- [Contact](https://hanjo.ai/contact/): Intake form for a free consultation, in English or Japanese.

## Key facts

- Location: Los Angeles, California, United States
- Languages: English and Japanese
- Founder: Kei Nakayama
- Specialty vertical: booking-based local businesses (beauty salons, head spas, esthetics, dental, clinics)
- Pricing model: performance-based where possible (for example, a share of recovered or newly generated booking value; no setup or monthly fee for hanjo Recovery)
- Booking platform focus: Square (with others by request)
